para_trans: Development of e-services of the department and
Task Force for implementation
Regarding the installation of...
Government of Maharashtra
Industries, Energy, Labour and Mining Department,
Government Decision No. - Narrow 2026 / P.No.28 / Labour - 9
Mantralaya, Mumbai 400 032
Reference: - Letter No.BUD-1624 / P.No.69 / LDC of General Administration Department,
The Proposal: -
Preparation of plans for development and implementation of e-services of the Department of Labour, as well as
Government to set up Task Force for e-enabling notified services of the Department
was under consideration. Accordingly, the government has taken the following decision.
The Government's Decisions:
To enable the services notified under the Department of Labour, the following:
A Task Force is being set up: -
3. The functions of the Task Force shall be as follows: -
(1) To prepare a plan for the development and implementation of e-services of the Department of Labour.
(2) E-enabling notified services of the Department of Labour.
table_trans: Directorate of Industrial Safety and Health, Mumbai
and CEO, Maharashtra Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Mumbai.
